message:
feat(e2e): hot-path profile replay support and reproducible benchmark command generation

perf_runner.rs:
- Add golden_dir and working_base config fields for reference database paths
- Add concurrent_mode and run_integrity_check to report and manifest structs
- Update markdown rendering to display new settings
- Integrate golden_dir and working_base into manifest for reproducible runs

realdb_e2e.rs:
- Add shell_escape() utility for safely escaping strings with special
  characters in generated shell commands
- Add format_hot_profile_replay_command() that generates reproducible
  'rch exec -- cargo run' commands with all benchmark parameters including
  db path, golden-dir, working-base, concurrency, seed, scale, output-dir,
  and conditional --mvcc/--integrity-check flags
- Reorganize imports alphabetically for consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
